content.text:
Searched: AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:blog.google OR site:anthropic.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:blog.google OR site:anthropic.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com","March 30 2026 AI product launch news site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com OR site:venturebeat.com","2026-03-30 AI product news today official blog AI release","March 2026 AI product update official blog"],"query":"AI product news March 30 2026 site:openai.com OR site:blog.google OR site:anthropic.com OR site:techcrunch.com OR site:theverge.com"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:openai.com index introducing OR announcements March 2026 AI product

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:openai.com index introducing OR announcements March 2026 AI product","site:blog.google innovation ai March 2026 product launch Gemini","site:anthropic.com/news March 2026 product","site:techcrunch.com AI product launch March 2026"],"query":"site:openai.com index introducing OR announcements March 2026 AI product"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:blog.google/technology/google-deepmind March 2026 Gemini product

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:blog.google/technology/google-deepmind March 2026 Gemini product","site:blog.google/products/gemini March 2026 Gemini product","site:blog.google/technology/ai March 2026 product launch","site:blog.google March 2026 AI updates Gemini 3"],"query":"site:blog.google/technology/google-deepmind March 2026 Gemini product"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:microsoft.com March 2026 Copilot product launch AI

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:microsoft.com March 2026 Copilot product launch AI","site:blogs.microsoft.com March 2026 Copilot update AI product","site:openai.com March 2026 product release AI","site:techcrunch.com March 2026 AI product OpenAI Google Microsoft"],"query":"site:microsoft.com March 2026 Copilot product launch AI"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

Searched: site:techcrunch.com AI product launch March 2026 OpenAI Google Microsoft latest

<tool_call>
{"arguments":{"queries":["site:techcrunch.com AI product launch March 2026 OpenAI Google Microsoft latest","site:theverge.com AI app launch March 2026 latest","site:venturebeat.com AI product March 2026 launch latest","site:blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gemini March 2026 Gemini feature"],"query":"site:techcrunch.com AI product launch March 2026 OpenAI Google Microsoft latest"},"name":"web_search"}
</tool_call>

截至今天 **2026-03-30**，我用 websearch 查到的、较值得关注的 **3 条 AI 产品新闻**：

1. **OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4**
   - 这是 OpenAI 面向专业工作的最新主力模型，已进入 **ChatGPT、API 和 Codex**，主打更强的 reasoning、coding、tool use，以及对文档/表格/演示类任务的支持。
   - 来源：https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4/

2. **Google 给 Docs / Sheets / Slides / Drive 上线新 Gemini 能力**
   - Google 在 **2026-03-10** 宣布，Gemini 将更深度接入 Google Workspace，可直接帮助生成文档、搭表、做演示，并结合你的文件、邮件和网页信息完成任务。
   - 来源：https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-workspace-updates-march-2026/

3. **Microsoft 推进 Microsoft 365 Copilot Wave 3 和 Agent 365**
   - Microsoft 在 **2026-03-09** 强调，Copilot 的 agentic 能力正嵌入 **Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Outlook 和 Copilot Chat**，并配套推出 **Agent 365** 做企业级治理与安全管理。
   - 来源：https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/03/09/powering-frontier-transformation-with-copilot-and-agents/

如果你要，我也可以继续给你补一版：
- **更偏消费级 AI 产品**（App / 助手 / 创作工具）
- 或 **更偏开发者/编程 AI 产品**（API / agent / coding tools）
